craigslist.title: New to town? Enjoy Woodspring Suites $2,854 -4 Week Rates!
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post NO HASSLE - NO CREDIT CHECKS Before you decide to stay at Woodspring Suites, we want you to be prepared--prepared for a better experience. What that means to us is a truly affordable, incredibly clean, safer, simple, flexible experience. And this is more than just a nice idea --it's the Woodspring Suites promise. So how do we do it? By combining all the convenience of a hotel with all the essentials of an apartment. We are a hybrid--and that makes us better than a hotel, an apartment or any other short-term housing accommodations you’ll find. Think about it—no extras padded into our price, no hidden fees. No lease to sign, no utilities to set up. That’s just for starters. Find out below more of what to expect when you’re here. • Clean & Safe –Secure building access with electronically protected interior. A Safety attendant is available after hotel hours. All rooms are thoroughly cleaned after each check-out, and then go through a vigorous multi-point inspection. • Kitchen— Kitchens have a full-size refrigerator/freezer, ceramic stove-top, microwave, cabinet space and a spacious sink. • Furnished Studios—Dresser, nightstand, eating table with chair, clothes rack and extra storage space. • Satellite/Cable – Premium satellite or cable television with Movie Channels • 24-Hour Laundry Facility—On-site laundry facility with keyed guest access only for your safety. • Linen Exchange— During office hours bring your towels/linens to the front desk for a quick exchange. • High-Speed Internet—Go online 24/7 with free wi-fi. High speed internet available for a nominal fee. • Coffeemaker—A drip coffeemaker that makes 8 to 10 cups. Yours to keep with a one-time fee. • Housekeeping –Housekeeping is included every other week. Additional cleaning can be purchased for a fee. • Dish Pack—Service for two including plates, bowls, mugs, glasses, utensils, cooking slotted turner, skillet, saucepan, dish cloth and kitchen towel. Yours to keep for a one-time charge. • Pets – Dogs are welcome (No Cats). $50 fee required at check-in plus $10 per night. Service animals always allowed at no cost. WoodSpring Suites Santee - San Diego Northeast, 8801 Mission Gorge Rd, Santee, CA 9207. show contact info

craigslist.title: End-Unit Townhome in Otay Ranch | 2BR + Loft | Park Views | 1,479 Sq F
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Townhome in Otay Ranch Spacious End-Unit Townhome in Otay Ranch | 2BR + Loft | Park Views | 1,479 Sq Ft Your spacious and bright end-unit townhome awaits, available July 1st! $3,650/month | $3,650 Security Deposit | 2 Bedrooms + Loft/Office | 2.5 Baths | 1,479 sq ft Welcome home to a peaceful, well-maintained community in the heart of Otay Ranch. This inviting townhome offers the perfect blend of comfort, convenience, and lifestyle. Ideal for families, professionals, or anyone seeking a vibrant community, you'll find something to love here. Why you'll love this home: Spacious & Bright: Enjoy a comfortable 1,479 sq ft of living space with 2 bedrooms and a loft/office with 2.5 baths, perfect for families. The end-unit design ensures ample natural light and is conveniently located in front of All Seasons Park. Convenience at your fingertips: Includes an attached 1-car garage, as well as a reserved parking spot conveniently located next to the home and a front-load washer and dryer – simplifying your daily life. Stylish & Comfortable: Plantation shutters throughout home, water softener, recessed lighting, and efficient air conditioning/heating create a welcoming and comfortable atmosphere. Beautifully renovated kitchen featuring granite countertops, stainless steel appliances, and modern fixtures. Outdoor Living: Enjoy the patio off the living area, perfect for entertaining or unwinding while watching the sunset. Ample Storage: Benefit from a walk-in closet in the master bedroom, providing plenty of storage space. Community Perks: Resort-Style Amenities: Dive into the sparkling pool, have a BBQ cookout, relax in the spa, or enjoy a nice workout at the community gym. Prime Location: Conveniently located near the 125 freeway, providing easy access to all of San Diego. Lifestyle & Entertainment: Enjoy proximity to Otay Ranch Town Center, AMC Theatre, and a variety of dining, entertainment, and retail options. Key Details: Available: July 1st Lease Term: 1-year minimum Tours to be scheduled during the following days/times: June 14 (Sun) from 10:00 AM to 1:00 PM June 20 (Sat) from 10:00 AM to 1:00 PM June 21 (Sun) from 10:00 AM to 1:00 PM Owner pays for trash. Renter is responsible for all other utilities (e.g., water/sewer, electricity, gas, Wi-Fi). First month and security deposit due at signing. No smoking allowed.

craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post NO HASSLE - NO CREDIT CHECKS Before you decide to stay at Woodspring Suites, we want you to be prepared--prepared for a better experience. What that means to us is a truly affordable, incredibly clean, safer, simple, flexible experience. And this is more than just a nice idea --it's the Woodspring Suites promise. So how do we do it? By combining all the convenience of a hotel with all the essentials of an apartment. We are a hybrid--and that makes us better than a hotel, an apartment or any other short-term housing accommodations you’ll find. Think about it—no extras padded into our price, no hidden fees. No lease to sign, no utilities to set up. That’s just for starters. Find out below more of what to expect when you’re here. • Clean & Safe –Secure building access with electronically protected interior. A Safety attendant is available after hotel hours. All rooms are thoroughly cleaned after each check-out, and then go through a vigorous multi-point inspection. • Kitchen— Kitchens have a full-size refrigerator/freezer, ceramic stove-top, microwave, cabinet space and a spacious sink. • Furnished Studios—Dresser, nightstand, eating table with chair, clothes rack and extra storage space. • Satellite/Cable – Premium satellite or cable television with Movie Channels • 24-Hour Laundry Facility—On-site laundry facility with keyed guest access only for your safety. • Linen Exchange— During office hours bring your towels/linens to the front desk for a quick exchange. • High-Speed Internet—Go online 24/7 with free wi-fi. High speed internet available for a nominal fee. • Coffeemaker—A drip coffeemaker that makes 8 to 10 cups. Yours to keep with a one-time fee. • Housekeeping –Housekeeping is included every other week. Additional cleaning can be purchased for a fee. • Dish Pack—Service for two including plates, bowls, mugs, glasses, utensils, cooking slotted turner, skillet, saucepan, dish cloth and kitchen towel. Yours to keep for a one-time charge. • Pets – Dogs are welcome (No Cats). $50 fee required at check-in plus $10 per night. Service animals always allowed at no cost.
